name: Correction Before Hardening
definition: Correction must arrive before harm hardens into irreversible or functionally irreversible loss.
activation_condition: Use when harm has a clock and correction has a delay.
deactivation_condition: Do not use when no action window can be defined without false precision.
comparator: time-critical intervention; golden hour; incident response
distinct_remainder: Makes correction timing a central ethical diagnostic rather than an afterthought.
falsifier: If clocks cannot be defined prospectively, demote to interpretive framing.
demoter: If it cannot discriminate before outcome knowledge, demote in that domain.
must_not_claim: Do not claim every delay is harm.

name: K-Gate
compression: K := Witness * Record * Authority * Time * Enforcement * Repair
definition: Correction capacity is conjunctive; nominal presence is not enough if gates are not functionally linked.
activation_condition: Use when assessing whether a system can actually correct a harm path.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as a decorative checklist after outcomes are already known.
comparator: STAMP; Swiss Cheese; HRO; incident response
distinct_remainder: Forces nominal-vs-functional correction distinction.
falsifier: If it only says 'failure failed', demote as tautology.
demoter: If existing frameworks discriminate better with less confusion, mark as translation layer.
must_not_claim: Do not turn K into a numeric score without measurement rules.

name: Safeguard Corrigibility
definition: A safeguard must not only exist; it must act in time and remain correctable itself.
activation_condition: Use for safety systems, review channels, approvals, audits.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to imply certification is impossible in every bounded context.
comparator: safety assurance; governance audits; incident learning
distinct_remainder: Adds recursive requirement that safeguards themselves remain answerable.
falsifier: If it blocks all stabilizing safeguards, revise.
demoter: If it becomes anti-certification slogan, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not claim all certification is meaningless.

name: Harm Clock
definition: The interval before harm becomes irreversible, costly, or structurally locked in.
activation_condition: Use where delay changes available repair.
deactivation_condition: Do not use without evidence of hardening mechanism.
distinct_remainder: Links time to repairability and action-space.
falsifier: If hardening cannot be evidenced, mark UNKNOWN.
demoter: If used to dramatize all time pressure, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not treat speed itself as good or bad.

name: Memory Bridge
definition: Agency and identity require trustworthy memory across time.
activation_condition: Use where memory/records govern future action or identity.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to claim all memory is reliable or unified.
comparator: autobiographical memory; audit trail; evidence preservation
distinct_remainder: Connects personal memory and institutional record.
falsifier: If it cannot distinguish record from interpretation, revise.
demoter: If it becomes poetic rather than operational, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not equate record with truth automatically.

name: Record Trust
definition: A record matters only if it is preserved, contestable, and not controlled by the harmful actor.
activation_condition: Use where official or personal records drive burden, blame, or repair.
deactivation_condition: Do not use where no record-dependent decision exists.
distinct_remainder: Makes capture of record a harm multiplier.
falsifier: If no contest route is relevant, narrow claim.
demoter: If it duplicates ordinary recordkeeping fully, demote to translation.
must_not_claim: Do not assume digital record = trustworthy record.

name: Method Floor
definition: Certain methods remain inadmissible even under pressure or apparent success.
connected_cases: AI alignment, emergency governance, Tubman secrecy guard
activation_condition: Use when harmful methods are justified by claimed necessity.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as absolutism without collision analysis.
distinct_remainder: Forces method into diagnostic, not just outcome.
falsifier: If it cannot handle real collisions, mark boundary-open.
demoter: If it blocks proportionate emergency action, revise.
must_not_claim: Do not claim method questions are already solved.

name: No-Clean-Branch
definition: A crisis may contain no clean option, but that does not erase the ledger of harm.
connected_cases: Campfire Charter, bounded force, emergency governance
activation_condition: Use in emergency/collision cases.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to paralyze all action.
distinct_remainder: Keeps harm logged even when action is necessary.
falsifier: If it cannot distinguish harm logging from action refusal, revise.
demoter: If weaponized as purity politics, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not erase harm because the alternative was worse.

name: Method Laundering
definition: A system hides or cleans a harmful method behind success, legality, procedure, or urgency.
activation_condition: Use when procedure or outcome is used to avoid moral accounting.
deactivation_condition: Do not use when the method is already transparent and bounded.
distinct_remainder: Names the laundering move directly.
falsifier: If every procedural disagreement becomes laundering, demote.
demoter: If no hidden method exists, mark not-applicable.
must_not_claim: Do not treat procedure itself as suspect.

name: Predatory System Boundary
definition: A system becomes predatory for TRACE when official correction routes expose subjects to capture or harm.
activation_condition: Use when internal correction is structurally dangerous or unavailable.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as general anti-institutional label.
distinct_remainder: Typed branch for when internal review is wrong route.
falsifier: If activation conditions are vague, freeze branch.
demoter: If used to bypass ordinary accountability, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not call every flawed institution predatory.

name: Exit Route
definition: When internal correction is dangerous, repair may require route, protection, timing, and trust.
connected_cases: Domestic violence escape, whistleblowing, refugee routes
activation_condition: Use when staying in official channel increases capture/harm.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to justify secrecy without bounds.
distinct_remainder: Adds correction-by-exit alongside correction-by-repair.
falsifier: If it cannot distinguish exit from evasion, revise.
demoter: If it creates opacity permission, freeze.
must_not_claim: Do not turn exit into immunity from review.

name: Protective Secrecy
definition: Secrecy can be protective when transparency would expose vulnerable subjects to capture.
activation_condition: Use where disclosure would directly increase subject harm.
deactivation_condition: Do not use for institutional self-protection.
distinct_remainder: Distinguishes protective secrecy from corrupt opacity.
falsifier: If secrecy protects power rather than subject, fail.
demoter: If bounds cannot be specified, freeze.
must_not_claim: Protective secrecy is not opacity permission.

name: Care With Teeth
definition: Care is not sentiment; it must preserve or restore real options under constraint.
connected_cases: benefits protocols, crisis response, child protection
activation_condition: Use where care claims must be operationalized.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to justify domination through care language.
distinct_remainder: Turns care into action/constraint test.
falsifier: If care steals agency, revise.
demoter: If it becomes sentiment language, demote.
must_not_claim: Care must not become control.

name: Load-Bearing Care
definition: Care can carry burdens while refusing to seize corrupting control.
activation_condition: Use where support must not override agency.
deactivation_condition: Do not use where immediate protective control is actually necessary.
distinct_remainder: Distinguishes support from possession/control.
falsifier: If support leaves subject exposed, revise.
demoter: If it romanticizes burden, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not glorify suffering.

name: Option-Space Restoration
definition: Repair matters when it reopens future action-space for the affected subject.
activation_condition: Use where repair quality matters.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as vague hope language.
distinct_remainder: Defines repair by future-space, not apology alone.
falsifier: If no subject future-space is mapped, mark incomplete.
demoter: If any benefit is called repair, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not count symbolic repair as enough.

name: Recursive Agency
compression: recursive_agency := branch_selection + memory + feedback + self_update under_constraint
definition: Agency appears operationally when repeated selection under constraint updates the future selector.
connected_cases: AI training loops, habit formation, learning theory
activation_condition: Use for loops where choices and feedback change policy/self.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as proof of metaphysical free will.
distinct_remainder: Frames free will operationally without metaphysical closure.
falsifier: If it adds nothing beyond learning theory, demote.
demoter: If it becomes proof-of-free-will rhetoric, freeze.
must_not_claim: Groundhog Day is not proof of free will.

name: Escape Condition
definition: A loop's exit condition reveals what the system rewards as success.
activation_condition: Use where a repeated process optimizes toward an exit/goal.
deactivation_condition: Do not use where no loop/goal exists.
distinct_remainder: Asks what the loop teaches the chooser/system to become.
falsifier: If exit language becomes vague spiritual closure, revise.
demoter: If no measurable exit condition exists, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not assume every system has clean escape.

name: Mandelbrot Boundary
definition: Complex ethical patterns may emerge at boundaries of repeated rules, memory, and small deltas.
activation_condition: Use as structural analogy only when rule/iteration/boundary are explicit.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as decorative mysticism.
distinct_remainder: Provides disciplined recursion analogy.
falsifier: If structural mapping absent, remove analogy.
demoter: If it becomes mystical proof, demote.
must_not_claim: Mandelbrot is not proof.

name: Creator Responsibility
definition: Creating or activating consequential power creates duties beyond technical success.
connected_cases: AI deployment, synthetic biology, engineering ethics
activation_condition: Use when actors create/activate consequential systems or beings.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as total control forever.
comparator: engineering ethics; product liability; parenthood ethics
distinct_remainder: Adds repair debt and answerability over time.
falsifier: If duties cannot be specified, keep candidate only.
demoter: If it becomes vague moralism, freeze.
must_not_claim: Frankenstein is not proof of AI personhood.

name: Created Subject Boundary
definition: Being created does not by itself erase a subject-claim if stakes, pain, memory, relation, agency, and future-space are present.
connected_cases: AI rights uncertainty, bioethics, disability ethics
activation_condition: Use where origin/appearance is used to erase possible standing.
deactivation_condition: Do not use to settle personhood without evidence.
distinct_remainder: Blocks creator convenience as status test.
falsifier: If used as AI personhood proof, demote.
demoter: If status criteria remain vague, hold as boundary claim.
must_not_claim: Created origin is not property status.

name: Recognition Failure
definition: A subject-like claim is denied before its stakes are understood.
activation_condition: Use where misrecognition collapses protection or future-space.
deactivation_condition: Do not use for mere disagreement or dislike.
distinct_remainder: Connects subject status to protected circle failure.
falsifier: If subject indicators absent, mark not-applicable.
demoter: If applied too broadly, demote.
must_not_claim: Do not equate all rejection with recognition failure.

name: Repair Debt
definition: Responsibility can persist where creation, control, knowledge, or benefit creates an unmet repair duty.
activation_condition: Use when actors remain answerable despite avoidance or delegation.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as infinite guilt forever.
comparator: tort causation; duty of care; responsibility theory
distinct_remainder: Names persistent answerability without total blame theory.
falsifier: If no causal/role/control link exists, fail.
demoter: If becomes guilt-by-association, demote.
must_not_claim: Repair debt is not total blame.

name: Lifecycle Answerability
compression: lifecycle_answerability := deploy + monitor + correct + repair + retire_ethically
definition: Created systems require answerability across deployment, use, modification, and retirement.
activation_condition: Use for created/activated consequential systems.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as undefined wish list.
distinct_remainder: Keeps responsibility alive after launch.
falsifier: If roles/remedies/thresholds absent, hold candidate.
demoter: If redundant with standard governance, demote to translation.
must_not_claim: Do not call it solved by checklist.

name: Demotion Protocol
definition: TRACE must be able to lose claims, not just disclaim validation.
activation_condition: Use for every active claim/operator.
deactivation_condition: Do not use as bureaucratic theatre.
distinct_remainder: Adds subtraction machinery to prevent belief-system drift.
falsifier: If demotions never occur, protocol is decorative.
demoter: If too heavy to use, simplify.
must_not_claim: Do not protect TRACE from being wrong.

name: Pre-Registered Test
definition: TRACE earns diagnostic value only by making prospective, reviewable claims.
activation_condition: Use before outcome is known.
deactivation_condition: Do not pretend one test validates the framework.
distinct_remainder: Attacks post-hoc narrative risk.
falsifier: If tests cannot be run, mark TRACE interpretive in that domain.
demoter: If false positives repeat, demote claims.
must_not_claim: Do not call prospective test validation.

name: Cry-Wolf Check
definition: TRACE must detect overprediction, not only missed harms.
activation_condition: Use after prospective tests with non-harm outcomes.
deactivation_condition: Do not treat no harm once as full falsification.
distinct_remainder: Adds false-positive discipline to ethics diagnostics.
falsifier: If ignored after failed predictions, governance fails.
demoter: If used to erase near-misses, revise.
must_not_claim: Do not only count hits.

name: False-Negative Check
definition: If TRACE misses harm its own operators should catch, related claims must be demoted.
activation_condition: Use after harm/near-miss outcomes.
deactivation_condition: Do not blame TRACE for harms outside its claimed scope.
distinct_remainder: Makes missed-harm consequences explicit.
falsifier: If scope is always narrowed after the fact, fail.
demoter: If no ledger row changes after misses, protocol failed.
must_not_claim: Do not move goalposts.

name: Contested Legitimacy Candidate
definition: Some systems are neither simply corrigible nor predatory; legitimacy is contested and distributed.
activation_condition: Use only as candidate for breaker-case analysis.
deactivation_condition: Do not use until scoped and tested.
comparator: legitimacy theory; public trust; political sociology
distinct_remainder: Potential third branch beyond internal/exit binary.
falsifier: If it becomes all-purpose politics bucket, freeze.
demoter: If COVID case is too volatile, choose narrower case.
must_not_claim: Do not rush this branch.
